description: Create a user named 'Milestone VMS_Service' in 2N Access Commander (https://localhost:9443, admin/2n). Enable Access Commander login (Login: api_milestone / Password: ApiAuth#2026_xP!) and grant Administrator privileges. Assign the email 'vms-api@buildingtech.com', company 'BuildingTech Solutions', and group 'IT Department'. Do not assign any physical credentials (RFID/PIN) to this API service account.
